name: LangBot
description: Production-grade platform for building agentic IM bots - 生产级多平台智能机器人开发平台. 提供 Agent、知识库编排、插件系统 / Bots for Discord / Slack / LINE / Telegram / WeChat(企业微信, 企微智能机器人, 公众号) / 飞书 / 钉钉 / QQ / Satori e.g. Integrated with ChatGPT(GPT), DeepSeek, Dify, n8n, Langflow, Coze, Claude, Gemini, MiniMax, Ollama, SiliconFlow, Moonshot, GLM, clawdbot / openclaw
